author: saiken
description: Show similar existing notes while you write a new one, and merge duplicates without losing links. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Israel Avila
manifest.description: Show similar existing notes while you write a new one, and merge duplicates without losing links.
manifest.name: Prior Art

name: Prior Art

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Show similar existing notes while you write a new one, and merge duplicates without losing links.

The optional Pro semantic feature uses the Second Read engine — a local, offline sidecar installed in one click and SHA-256-verified. Free features need no engine.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/israerusan/prior-art/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
